daily.today_energy: Your emotional intuition is absolutely fire today. Trust those gut feelings—they're basically your spiritual radar picking up on something real. Move through your day with that cozy confidence energy.
daily.love: Someone's been noticing you more than you realize. Whether you're coupled or single, your warmth is magnetic right now. Let yourself be a little vulnerable—it's actually your superpower today.
daily.career: Your ideas have legs today. Don't sleep on that creative solution bouncing around in your head. Even small steps forward count—momentum is building and the universe is rewarding your effort.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding energy. Maybe that's a walk, cooking something nourishing, or just sitting with your thoughts. Listen to what makes you feel genuinely at peace, not what you think you should do.

weekly.overview: This week invites you to lean into your natural intuition, Cancer. The cosmos is whispering that it's time to trust yourself more and seek external validation less. Something's shifting in your favor—stay open to unexpected moments of clarity.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled or solo, there's a gentle pull toward authenticity in your connections. Stop overthinking what they might think and show up as your real self. The right people will vibe with your energy when you're genuinely present.
weekly.career: Your creative instincts are firing on all cylinders right now. This is the week to pitch that idea you've been sitting on or approach a project from a totally fresh angle. Trust that unconventional thinking will get you noticed.
weekly.health: Your body's asking you to slow down and actually listen to what it needs. Whether that's more sleep, moving differently, or just being gentler with yourself—honor those signals. Rest isn't lazy; it's strategic.
